It had fallen down and was acting strange. When I turned it on it started, but the display didn't come on. If you tapped on a specific spot, the display would turn on, but sometimes it would simply turn off again. We couldn't find any cracks on the display. Perhaps we had now reattached a plug that was no longer completely tight? The owner will continue to monitor and come back if the error occurs again.

After replacing the battery some time ago, the smartphone vehemently refused to charge the new battery. In any case, nothing happened when we plugged in the power supply and the charging indicator remained at its low level. All contacts, connectors and cables seemed to be OK, so we ultimately didn't know what to do next.

A battery from the phone also had to be disposed of properly. This no longer showed any tension and had already bloated significantly. For this reason, the phone did not show any function and did not charge the battery. But with a new replacement battery it should work again soon.
The display on the iPhone 3 had taken off. The reason for this was the built-in battery, which was quite bloated and needs to be replaced. Then the device will return to its original shape.

The camera lens had cracked and ruined numerous photo shots for the owner. She had already gotten a replacement. We helped her disassemble the phone according to instructions from the internet, remove the old lens and glue in the new one. This required a lot of patience and sensitivity, as the adhesive surface had to be slowly heated with a hairdryer to soften the adhesive and the lens then had to be carefully lifted off. You should always allow a little more time for such delicate repairs.

The home button now only responds when pressed very hard. However, since the entire key assembly probably has to be replaced and special tools are required to open and disassemble, we unfortunately had to pass considering the time had already passed. It is better to plan around two hours for such demanding repair work on such highly integrated and sensitive electronics. With a short message in advance, the right tool can also be organized in good time. The visitor now thinks about whether he should buy a spare part and come back with the phone to one of the next appointments.

The led light is also permanently lit dimly draining the battery even when the phone is switched off A spare iPhone4S (white) with an iCloud locked logic board was used for spare parts. The logic board from both phones were removed and swapped over, thus two non-working phones were converted into one working phone. The current secondhand retail price on a working iPhone4S is about £30 making the price on replacement parts prohibitively high, salvaging from another iPhone is the best option. IFixit was used as a take apart guide. The Battery removal tab was accidentally allowed to get trapped under the logic board on the fixed phone. The effort of removing the logic board again on discovery was considered not worth it. ooo-xxx.
